meaning: adj.[只做表语] 乐意,不得不,只得... adv.欣然,乐意地
examples: Could I exchange my nature with any other creature, I fain would be such a happy little lark!
I would fain do as you ask.
"I would fain know if I am destined for so glorious a career," cried the Tree, rejoicing.
Cast: Robin Weigert, Maggie Siff, Johnathan Tchaikovsky, Julie Fain Lawrence, Emily Kinney, Laila Robins.
Royal Caribbean's Voyager of the Seas ship, set to sail in June from China, sold out quicker than expected, Mr. Fain said.
